name: Wisteria Twist
projectTitle: Comparative PM emissions tool for coal vs. natural gas power generation
description: This tool estimates uncontrolled and controlled PM2.5 and PM10 emission rates from two power plant alternatives — a pulverized coal (dry-bottom) plant and a natural gas combined-cycle (CCGT) plant — sized to meet a user-specified AI data center electrical demand. For the coal plant, three optional particulate control configurations are available: ESP only, baghouse only, or ESP followed by baghouse in series.
